meta.title: tetra-tools.com — Assistive Devices for Tetraplegics
meta.description: Specialized assistive devices for people with tetraplegia: catheter insertion aid, typing aid, Tetra tongs, and more.

hero.label: Assistive Devices for Tetraplegics
hero.title: More Independence
hero.description: We develop and manufacture practical assistive devices that give people with tetraplegia greater independence in many areas of life — from the kitchen, through the office and bathroom, to the workshop.

intro.title: Why TetraTools?
intro.text1: Our assistive devices are born from lived experience. As people with tetraplegia ourselves, we know what truly matters in daily life — and we build solutions that work.
intro.text2: All products are manufactured in Germany and can be individually customized. If you're interested, please contact us via email.

features.title: By Tetraplegics, for Tetraplegics
features.description: Developed from lived experience — we know the challenges of everyday life.

features.title: Made in Germany
features.description: All products are carefully manufactured in Germany.

features.title: Individual Customization
features.description: Every device can be adapted to personal needs.

items.title: Tetrapliers
items.shortDescription: The original! Designed for catheterization (ISC), but versatile in use.
items.description: The Tetrapliers is a gripping aid specially developed for intermittent self-catheterization (ISC) by tetraplegics. It enables grasping and holding the catheter, as well as other objects in everyday life. From the kitchen to the workshop — the Tetrapliers is a versatile companion.
features: Available in left- and right-handed versions

items.title: Connector Aid for Catheters
items.shortDescription: Aid for securely connecting a catheter to a urine bag.
items.description: Connecting a catheter to a urine bag can be a matter of luck for people with limited hand strength. Not anymore with our connector aid! It enables the secure joining of catheter and bag while providing a thoughtfully designed grip for holding the catheter.
features: Secure connection between catheter and urine bag
Available in left- and right-handed versions

items.title: Pants Hook
items.shortDescription: Aid for securely holding the waistband while catheterizing.
items.description: Our pants hook holds the underwear waistband during catheterization, leaving both hands free to take care of the task. It hooks onto the waistband and is attached to the seat cushion between the legs. It offers multiple gripping options for easy hooking to the seat cushion.
features: For hooking onto the seat cushion

items.title: Pullover Hook
items.shortDescription: Aid for securely holding the sweater during catheterization.
items.description: The pullover hook holds the sweater up during catheterization. The cord is placed around the neck and the sweater is secured in the hook. WARNING: This aid is not a toy. Due to its sturdy construction there is a risk of strangulation. Never allow children to handle it.

items.title: Pen Holder
items.description: Writing is most comfortable when you hold the pen in a natural hand position. Our pen holder makes exactly that possible: it is attached to the thumb and between the index and middle finger and provides a secure grip for pens with a diameter of approx. 8 to 12 mm. This allows you to write, draw or paint without difficulty.
features: For pen diameters of approx. 8 to 12 mm
Available in left- and right-handed versions

items.title: Typing Aid
items.shortDescription: Universal typing aid for computer keyboards and other keys.
items.description: The typing aid enables people without finger function to type independently on a standard keyboard. The typing aid is simply slipped onto the hand and you're ready to go...!

contact.title: Interested?
contact.description: Contact us via email to learn more about our products or to make an inquiry. We're happy to advise you individually.

datenschutz.chapter1: 1. Name and contact details of the controller
datenschutz.chapter1Content:
These data protection notices apply to us,
TetraTools, owner Dominik Hans
Wagnerstraße 10
76461 Muggensturm
Tel.: +49 171 2303011
Email: request@tetra-tools.com,
as the controller.
datenschutz.chapter2: 2. Collection and storage of personal data; type, purpose and use
datenschutz.chapter3: 3. Transfer of data to third parties
datenschutz.chapter3Content: A transfer of your personal data to third parties does not generally take place. Exceptions apply only insofar as this is necessary for the processing of contractual relationships with you. This includes, in particular, disclosure to service providers commissioned by us (so-called processors) or other third parties whose activities are necessary for the performance of the contract (e.g., shipping companies, health insurers or banks). The data disclosed may be used by the third parties only for the purposes stated.
datenschutz.chapter4: 4. Your rights as a data subject
datenschutz.chapter4Content:
As a person affected by the processing of data, you have various rights:
- Right of withdrawal: You may withdraw consents you have given to us at any time. Data processing that is based on the withdrawn consent may no longer be carried out for the future.
- Right of access: You may request information about the personal data we process about you. This applies in particular to the purposes of the data processing, the categories of personal data, where applicable the categories of recipients, the storage period, where applicable the origin of your data and, where applicable, the existence of automated decision-making including profiling and, where applicable, meaningful information about its details.
- Right to rectification: You may request the correction of incorrect or the completion of your personal data stored with us.
- Right to erasure: You may request the deletion of your personal data stored with us, provided that its processing is not necessary for the exercise of the right to freedom of expression and information, for compliance with a legal obligation, for reasons of public interest or for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims.
- Right to restriction of processing: You may request the restriction of the processing of your personal data if you contest the accuracy of the data, the processing is unlawful but you oppose its deletion. You also have this right if we no longer need the data but you need them for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims. Furthermore, you have this right if you have objected to the processing of your personal data;
- Right to data portability: You may request that we transmit to you the personal data you have provided to us in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format. Alternatively, you may request the direct transfer of the personal data you have provided to us to another controller, insofar as this is technically feasible.
- Right to lodge a complaint: You may lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority responsible for us, e.g., if you believe that we are processing your personal data unlawfully. The supervisory authority responsible for us is: Landesbeauftragter für den Datenschutz und die Informationsfreiheit Baden-Württemberg, Heilbronner Straße 35, 70191 Stuttgart, (Postal address: P.O. Box 10 29 32, 70025 Stuttgart); Telephone: 0711 6155410; E-mail: poststelle@lfdi.bwl.de.
datenschutz.chapter5Content: If we process your personal data on the basis of a legitimate interest, you have the right to object to that processing. If you wish to exercise your right to object, a notification in text form is sufficient. You may therefore write to us or contact us by e‑mail. Our contact details can be found under point 1 of these data protection notices.
datenschutz.chapter6Content:
We use so‑called cookies in some areas of our website. Such file elements can identify your computer as a technical unit during your visit to this website in order to make it easier for you to use our offering.
However, you usually have the option of configuring your web browser so that you are informed about the occurrence of cookies, so that you can allow or block them, or delete existing cookies.
Please use the help function of your web browser to obtain information on changing these settings. We point out that certain functions of our website may not work if you have disabled the use of cookies.
Cookies do not allow a server to read private data from your computer or data stored by another server. They do not harm your computer and do not contain viruses.
We base the use of cookies on Article 6(1)(f) GDPR: the processing is carried out to improve the functionality of our website. It is therefore necessary to protect our legitimate interests.
